data.body:
## Federal Compliance as First-Class Guidance

Activate ships a dedicated security.instructions.md covering NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, FISMA, FIPS 140-2/3, EO 14028 supply chain security (SBOM, SLSA), CUI/NIST 800-171, zero trust, and CISA 72-hour incident reporting. DSO has security review overlays but no compliance reference library. Lesson: This maps directly to epic e471-dda3 (reference libraries) — federal compliance should be a reference library agents can consult.
